sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (original String, lowercased String);
INSERT INTO test_strings (original, lowercased) VALUES ('MÜNCHEN', lowerUTF8('MÜNCHEN'));
INSERT INTO test_strings (original, lowercased) VALUES ('ANNA', lowerUTF8('ANNA'));
UPDATE test_strings SET lowercased = lowerUTF8(original) WHERE original = 'Österreich';
SELECT original, lowerUTF8(original) AS Lowered FROM test_strings;
